raw_text:
Director, Platform Engineering

We're seeking an experienced Director of Platform Engineering to lead the strategic vision and

execution of our Internal Developer Platform. You'll oversee a team of 12-15 senior engineers,

manage cross-functional initiatives with Product and Customer Success, and own the architectural

roadmap for our core platform services. This is a high-impact role requiring deep hands-on technical

expertise combined with exceptional leadership and organizational skills. You'll report to the VP of
Engineering and help shape the future of how enterprises deliver software at scale.

About the Company

Helix Technologies is a B2B SaaS company specializing in Internal Developer Platform (IDP)
solutions. We enable enterprises to abstract infrastructure complexity and provide self-service

capabilities to engineering teams. Our platform integrates infrastructure orchestration, deployment
pipelines, and observability tooling into a cohesive developer experience. Founded in 2019, we serve
200+ customers ranging from mid-market tech firms to Fortune 500 enterprises across financial

services, healthcare, and e-commerce sectors.

What You'll Own

1. Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 12-15 platform engineers, including 2-3 engineering
managers; conduct performance reviews, career development planning, and succession
planning

2. Own the technical architecture and roadmap for core platform services including Kubernetes

orchestration, multi-tenant infrastructure provisioning, and GitOps-based deployment systems

3. Define and execute the strategic platform engineering vision aligned with company OKRs;

partner with Product and Customer Success on prioritization of platform capabilities

4. Drive adoption of Terraform and Infrastructure-as-Code practices across the platform; establish
standards for state management, drift detection, and policy-as-code using tools like Sentinel

5. Establish and lead the adoption of Backstage and similar IDP frameworks to enhance
developer experience; own developer feedback loops and platform adoption metrics

6. Oversee incident management, reliability engineering, and SLO/SLI definition for all platform

services; drive post-incident reviews and continuous improvement culture

at Helix Technologies — Empowering developers to innovate fearlessly through unified, intelligentplatform infrastructureSan Francisco, CA (Remote-first, travel 10-15%) • Full-time • $280,000 - $420,000 + equity 7. Manage platform engineering budget (~$2-3M annually), vendor relationships (cloud providers,

observability platforms), and headcount planning

8. Collaborate with Security and Compliance teams to embed security controls, RBAC, and audit

logging into platform services; ensure SOC 2 and regulatory compliance

9. Represent platform engineering in executive forums; communicate technical strategy, progress,

and risks to executive leadership and the broader engineering organization

Preferred

Experience with Backstage, Pulumi, or

experience with at least 5+ years in

other declarative infrastructure and

developer portal frameworks

Technologies

HashiCorp Sentinel

  PostgreSQL

Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package with 4-year vesting and 1-year cliff

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with 100% premium coverage for

employees

Unlimited PTO policy with a minimum of 20 days recommended annually, plus 10 company

holidays

Professional development budget of $5,000 annually for conferences, certifications, and

learning

Flexible work environment with remote-first culture; home office stipend of $2,000 upon hire

Parental leave: 16 weeks fully paid for primary caregivers, 8 weeks for secondary caregivers

Mental health support through Ginger/BetterHelp and access to on-demand coaching

Annual team offsites and quarterly director/executive team retreats to foster collaboration and
culture

Next Steps

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter describing your platform engineering leadership
philosophy, and a link to your LinkedIn profile to careers@helixtech.io with the subject line 'Director,
Platform Engineering - [Your Name]'. Additionally, we encourage candidates to include links to
GitHub repositories, technical blog posts, or public speaking engagements that showcase your
platform infrastructure work. We review applications on a rolling basis and will contact qualified
candidates within 5 business days.
